Name: GRAPHICS_CONFIG_CS_SHADER_QUALITY_DETAIL
Description: Determines the parameters of each shader quality level.

Fields.Name: Enable Subsurface Scattering
Fields.Description: If ON, enable subsurface scattering via shaders.

Fields.Name: Enable Tessellation
Fields.Description: If ON, enable texture tessellation via shaders.

Fields.Name: Enable High Precision Normals
Fields.Description: If ON, high precision normal maps are used within the graphics buffer.
